description_long: This object is a tall, rectangular lotion bottle with a minimalist design, featuring a smooth, matte white exterior. The front and back faces display printed text in a subtle, light gray color, with one side showing more detailed product information and the other side displaying less text. The bottle has a flat top and bottom, with no visible pump or dispensing mechanism, suggesting a cap that is likely removed to access the contents. The overall shape is boxy and modern, with clean, sharp edges and no decorative elements. The material appears to be rigid plastic, typical for personal care product packaging, and the surface is unadorned except for the printed information.
description: A tall, rectangular white lotion bottle with a smooth, matte finish and minimal printed text on two sides.
description_view_0: This view shows a side of the bottle with some printed text and a clean, flat surface.
description_view_1: This view displays a plain, unmarked side of the bottle with no visible text or graphics.
description_view_2: This view reveals the side with the most detailed printed information, including product details and instructions.
description_view_3: This view shows another plain side of the bottle, similar to view 1, with no visible markings.
